full_text:
Han Qiong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Qiong. Served Wei. Third of Han De’s four sons. Died at Changshan facing Zhao Yun. Han Qiong is a fictional character. Han Qiong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Han Qiong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
